target.title: fix(docs): document Codex Computer Use enabled setting
target.body:
## Summary
- update the Codex Computer Use Quick setup example to set `plugins.entries.codex.config.computerUse.enabled` to `true`
- clarify that `enabled: true` is required before pairing it with `autoInstall`

## Why
The current Quick setup example only sets `computerUse.autoInstall`. In practice, `/codex computer-use status` can still report Computer Use as disabled/not installed after `/codex computer-use install` until `plugins.entries.codex.config.computerUse.enabled` is explicitly set to `true`.

## Verification
- `pnpm -s format:docs:check`
- `pnpm -s docs:check-mdx docs/plugins/codex-computer-use.md`
- `pnpm -s lint:docs`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: bdjben
